title: Hallo4D: Multi-Modal Hallucination Mitigation for Consistent Spatio-Temporal Generation
innovation_summary: Hallo4D: Multi-Modal Hallucination Mitigation for Consistent Spatio-Temporal Generation: We present Hallo4D, a unified and model-agnostic framework for mitigating spatiotemporal hallucinations in 3D and 4D content generation.
